chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-99 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.469/2025 2.For hearing of main case. 22.01.2025 Mr.Abdul Latif Chandio, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Afsheen Aman, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Ms.Afsheen Aman, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent (F.B.R), which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) states that the petitioner may approach the Department for provisional release per Section 83-B of the Customs Act, 1969 and the same shall be entertained forthwith. In view hereof, the petitioner counsel does not press this petition, which is disposed of. Judge Judge nasir`
